title: Jharkhand BEd Admit Card 2026

detail.title: Jharkhand BEd Admit Card 2026
detail.short_info: JCECEB Jharkhand BEd Entrance Exam Admit Card 2026 will be released today for the BEd CET scheduled on 31 May 2026. Download your Jharkhand BEd admit card 2026 from bedcet.jceceb.org.in using registration details and check exam date, shift, centre, details mentioned, documents required and exam‑day instructions here.

content.text: Jharkhand Combined Entrance Competitive Examination Board (JCECEB) will release the Jharkhand BEd Entrance Exam Admit Card 2026 today on the official BEd CET portal. As per the latest notification, the Jharkhand BEd Entrance Exam 2026 will be conducted on 31 May 2026, and the admit card is scheduled to be issued on 27 May 2026, i.e. today.

Candidates who have successfully applied for the JCECEB Jharkhand BEd Combined Entrance Competitive Examination 2026 for admission to the 2‑year BEd course (session 2026-28) can download their hall ticket once the link gets activated. The admit card will be available online only and will not be sent by post or email.

sections.heading: Jharkhand BEd Entrance Exam 2026 - Key Details

rows: Jharkhand Combined Entrance Competitive Examination Board (JCECEB)
Government, Government-Aided, Self-Financed and Private Recognised BEd Institutions of Jharkhand
Released 4 days before the exam date

sections.heading: How to Download JCECEB Jharkhand BEd Admit Card 2026 (Once Out Today)

content.text: After the admit card link is activated, candidates can download their Jharkhand BEd Entrance Exam hall ticket 2026 using the steps below:

items: Visit the official BEd entrance portal bedcet.jceceb.org.in or go via jceceb.jharkhand.gov.in and click on the Jharkhand BEd 2026 admit card link.
On the admit card page, click “Jharkhand B.Ed Admit Card 2026 / Candidate Login”.
Enter your Registration Number/Application Number and Password or Date of Birth, then fill the captcha code.
Click on Login / Submit to open your BEd CET dashboard. The Jharkhand BEd Admit Card 2026 will be displayed on the screen.
Carefully check your name, exam date (31 May 2026), exam centre, shift timing and other details.
Download and print 2-3 clear A4‑size copies of the admit card; keep at least one copy safely for counselling and admission processes.

content.text: If the website is slow or the link is not opening immediately after release, candidates should wait for some time and try again instead of repeatedly refreshing.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned on Jharkhand BEd Admit Card 2026

content.text: The Jharkhand BEd 2026 admit card will carry the following important details, which must be verified by every candidate:

items: Candidate’s name
Father’s / mother’s name
Registration number / application number and roll number
Exam name: Jharkhand BEd Entrance Exam 2026
Exam date (31 May 2026) and exam timing / shift
Examination centre name, code, city and complete address
Category and other candidate details (if printed)
Candidate’s photograph and signature (as uploaded in the application)
Important instructions and exam‑day guidelines for candidates

content.text: If any error or mismatch is found in your name, photograph, category, or exam centre details, you should immediately contact JCECEB through the official helpline numbers or email before the exam date.

sections.heading: Documents Required with Jharkhand BEd Admit Card 2026

content.text: On the day of the Jharkhand BEd Entrance Exam 2026, candidates must carry the following documents to the examination centre:

items: A printed copy of the Jharkhand BEd Admit Card 2026 (clear A4‑size printout, colour or good‑quality black and white).
One original valid photo identity proof, such as Aadhaar Card, PAN Card, Passport, Voter ID, Driving Licence or any other government‑issued ID specified by JCECEB.

content.text: It is advisable to also carry 1-2 recent passport‑size photographs (preferably the same as used in the application form) in case they are needed for verification. Candidates who fail to produce the admit card and valid ID will not be allowed to appear for the exam.

sections.heading: Exam‑Day Instructions for Jharkhand BEd Entrance Exam 2026

content.text: Candidates must strictly follow the instructions issued by JCECEB for the Jharkhand BEd Entrance Exam 2026:

items: Reach the exam centre well before the reporting time mentioned on the admit card; late entry after the gate‑closing time will not be permitted.
Carry only permitted items: Jharkhand BEd admit card, valid photo ID, a simple transparent pen/pencil and other items allowed in the notification; follow the instructions printed on your hall ticket.

Do not carry mobile phones, smart watches, calculators (unless explicitly allowed), Bluetooth devices, earphones, written notes, books or any other electronic gadgets or papers inside the exam hall; possession of such items may lead to cancellation of candidature.

Sit at the seat allotted to you and carefully follow the instructions given by invigilators and printed on the OMR/answer sheet; indulging in any unfair means can result in disqualification and further action by JCECEB.
Preserve your Jharkhand BEd admit card even after the exam, as it may be required during result declaration, counselling and admission formalities.
